auto_mode.allow: {intro} No blocking rules; Full Auto may apply it. Score: {score}.
auto_mode.disabled: Full Auto Mode is off; the user decides.
auto_mode.require_override_hard_auto: {intro} Hard rule hit: {names}. Auto may continue only with an override.
auto_mode.require_override_hard_manual: {intro} Hard rule hit: {names}. Manual decision required.
auto_mode.warn_critical: {intro} Critical warning: {names}. Suggestion remains possible, but is explained.

budget_goals.hint: Shows linked BudgetManager savings goals as read-only progress, for example a fountain pen goal. Enable the link on the savings goal in BudgetManager.
budget_goals.title: 🎯 BudgetManager savings goals

collector_health.hint: Checks rotation, ink levels, paper, warranty and collector-value completeness. The list shows useful next steps without changing the collection automatically.

issue.empty_pen: Pen is empty and available for rotation: {detail}
issue.high_cleaning_active: Active ink with high cleaning risk
issue.ink_empty: Ink is empty or at 0 ml
issue.load_overdue: Fill is above the safety limit: {detail} days
issue.missing_pen_photo: Collector item has no photo yet
issue.missing_pen_value: Value or purchase price is missing

collector_health.title: Collection advisor

dashboard.all_clear: All clear – no warnings, nothing in service, no advisor notes.
dashboard.inventory_line: Inventory: {pens} pens ({archived_pens} archived) · {archived_inks} inks archived · {service} in service/locked

quick_actions.hint: The four most common tasks directly on the start screen. More tools are in the expert area.
quick_actions.title: Quick start

dashboard.timer_title_counts: ⏱ Ink Safety Timer – {overdue} overdue · {soon} due soon
dashboard.value_mixed_currencies: Note: Collection value contains multiple currencies

enthusiast_lab.hint: Optional collector tools: ink levels, colour gaps, nib history and cleaning effort. Normal inventory use stays unchanged.

color.add_business_blue: You are missing a clear business blue
color.add_cool_grey: You are missing a cool grey for daily notes
color.add_warm_brown: You are missing a warm brown such as sepia, cognac or caramel
color.deep_green: Add a dark or forest green
color.teal_petrol: Add a teal or petrol ink
color.warm_brown: Add a warm brown or sepia

ink.buy_again_if_loved: Reorder if this is a favourite

enthusiast_lab.title: Enthusiast Lab

help.dashboard_body: The four cards show daily life: Active pens (inked), Inks, Warnings (overdue timers + rule violations) and Collection value. The grey line below summarises inventory (total / archived / service). Important: the Ink Safety Timer is an alert centre – it only shows overdue and soon-due fills (from 80% of the maximum days). Everything in the green zone is fully listed on the Rotation page under “Current loadout”.
help.manual_body: This help is the short form. The complete guide with every detail – score formula, dwell-time calculation, research flow, reference tables and FAQ – ships as docs/BENUTZERHANDBUCH_DE.md (German) in the program folder. It opens in any Markdown/text viewer and is print-friendly.
help.mode_body:
Easy Mode is the calm collection mode: pens, inks, wishlist and value calculation. Consumption/remaining amount is intentionally off.

Expert Mode enables deeper modules and allows consumption, more complex rules, Full Auto and more diagnostics.
help.quickstart_body:
Recommended order:
1. Add inks
2. Optionally add nibs or store them on the pen
3. Add pens and assign nibs
4. Fill a pen
5. On the Rotation page, click “💡 Suggestions” and fill with one click on a row

After that, dashboard, safety timer, rotation and rule warnings work as intended.

research.lookup_body: In the pen dialog, dimension lookup uses the cascade AI/structured search → manufacturer site → open web → local cache. Suggestions are shown before applying them and only fill empty fields; manual values are never overwritten. Image search, by contrast, intentionally starts on the manufacturer site and only then moves to the open web. Confirmed dimension matches are cached locally.
research.lookup_title: Dimensions: AI first · Images: manufacturer first
research.overlay_body:
Brand missing or domain wrong? Create the file manufacturer_domains.json in the data directory (next to the database) – no update needed. Example:
{ "My Brand": "mybrand.example",
  "Pilot": ["pilotpen.eu", "pilotpen.com"] }
A string or a list of domains per brand; entries here override the built-in list. Wrong entries are harmless – the open web search always runs as the last stage.
research.sources_body: Every suggestion names its source: manufacturer:<domain> = straight from the maker (preferred and sorted first), online:<domain> = open web, cache = previously confirmed local hit. So you can see at a glance how reliable a value is.

rotation.pins_body: A fixed pairing 💍 (set in the pen dialog) means: this pen always gets exactly this ink – randomness and reroll never override it. A must-include pen ⭐ always gets a slot first, but its ink remains free. The app’s principle: the engine recommends – you decide; every warning can be overridden.
rotation.random_body: Under Settings → Rotation & Suggestions you mix randomness into the selection: 0% = pure scoring, 100% = true random. Safety always stays on: combinations that could damage the pen (blocking hard rules, e.g. vacuum filler + shimmer) and full-auto rejections are never rolled. The summary line shows the active randomness.
rotation.reroll_body: Every further click on “💡 Suggestions” avoids the pen–ink pairs already shown and deliberately shows something new – rotating you through the whole collection. Once a pen has seen everything, a new round starts automatically for that pen (🔁 hint). Fixed pairings 💍 are exempt.
rotation.score_body: The score bundles role, colour diversity, idle times, nib/paper fit and rule bonuses/penalties: green ≥ 100 (great match), orange below 0 (rather unfavourable), red = blocking safety rule. The hint column shows all rule warnings plus the two most relevant infos – “… +N” means: more details in the tooltip and by clicking the score (why-explanation).
rotation.workflow_body: The engine suggests a matching ink for every empty pen. At the top you choose how many slots to fill, optionally paper and theme. Clicking “💡 Suggestions” builds the list; clicking a row opens the fill dialog. Pens in service, locked pens and empty bottles are skipped automatically.

paper.empty_subtitle: Add your first notebook or paper. Paper profiles will later be included in the rotation logic.
paper.name: Name
paper.title: Paper Management

pen.confirm_cleaned_detail:
The active ink load will be closed now.
The cleaning date will be set to today.

This action cannot be undone.
pen.title: Pen Management

pen_detail.nib_history_empty: No nib history for this pen yet.
pen_detail.sample_need_two_for_pen: This pen needs at least two writing samples for comparison.

pen_dimensions.image_lookup_message:
Google AI/image search opened: {opened}

The search is now broad instead of restricted with site:. Then choose a local image file or paste a direct image URL into the image field. On save, the image is stored under data/media/pens/<pen>/images.
pen_dimensions.image_lookup_tooltip: Opens a Google AI/web search and then an image search without a hard site: restriction. Then choose a local file or paste a direct image URL.
pen_dimensions.lookup_tooltip: Checks the local reference cache first, then looks online for structured dimensions. If no safe match is found, a broad Google AI/web search is opened instead of a narrow site: search.
pen_dimensions.need_brand_model: Please enter a brand or model first.
pen_dimensions.no_cache_message:
No safe cache or online match was found.

Google AI/web searches for technical data and images were opened: {opened}/{image_opened}.

Cache file:
{path}

Please verify manufacturer/shop data and enter the values manually. Images are stored centrally under data/media/pens/<pen>/ on save.

rotation.generate_tooltip: Clicking again deliberately shows different pen–ink pairs than before. Once every ink of a pen has been shown, a new round starts for that pen (🔁).
rotation.hint_repeat_round: 🔁 New round: every ink has already been suggested
rotation.msg_hard_rule: Hard/blocking rule hit. Please override manually with a reason.
rotation.msg_ink_empty_archived: This ink is empty or archived.
rotation.msg_pen_blocked: This pen is blocked for rotation/filling.
rotation.note_source_clean_refill: Applied manually from the empty/refill row
rotation.random_mode_active: Randomness {pct}% active – safety rules still apply
rotation.role_editor_hint: Define for each role which ink properties are preferred or avoided and which nibs/fill systems are typical.
rotation.role_nib_hint: Which nib sizes are typical for this role? Influences ink scoring (e.g. EF → prefers wet inks).
rotation.role_nib_tooltip: Comma-separated nib sizes that suit this role (informal, no hard filter).
rotation.role_reset_q: Reset all role rules to defaults?
rotation.role_tooltip: Functional role of this pen for rotation: EDC, agenda, journal, work, creative, etc.
rotation.theme_editor_hint: Define for each theme which ink properties and tags are preferred. Themes temporarily override the role on the rotation page.
rotation.theme_filter_tooltip: Rotation theme for ink suggestions and drain+fill. Auto uses the pen's default theme.
rotation.theme_testing_open: Test fill: some openness for experiments
rotation.theme_tooltip: Default theme/context for this pen. The rotation page can temporarily override it.
rotation.title: Smart Rotation

rules.overview_explain: Quick logic: hard rules protect the pen and can block a combination (⛔) – random mode never suggests them. Soft rules are recommendations and only change the score. Warn levels: 🔵 Info · 🟠 Warning · 🔴 Critical · ⛔ Blocked. Principle: the engine recommends – you decide. Double-click toggles a rule; every warning can be overridden when filling.

settings.budget_export_body: Exports all FPM expenses as a reviewable JSONL file. BudgetManager can import it later in a controlled way without directly accessing this database.
settings.budget_import_done_body: {count} BudgetManager suggestions were added as FPM expenses.
settings.budget_import_empty_body: No matching BudgetManager→FPM expense suggestions were found in this file.
settings.exchange_rates_hint: Rates are used to convert the collection value.
settings.mode_tooltip: Simple mode reduces the sidebar to daily core tasks. Expert mode shows every module.
settings.rotation_allow_duplicates: Allow the same active ink in multiple pens
settings.rotation_allow_duplicates_tooltip: Default is off: an ink is not suggested again while it is already active.
settings.rotation_page_body: Controls how strict or playful fill suggestions should be.
settings.rotation_random_note: Even at 100% randomness, blocked or potentially damaging combinations are not suggested. Warnings remain visible and can still be overridden manually.
settings.rotation_random_tooltip: 0% = fully score-based. 100% = random among safe combinations. Blocking damage rules remain excluded.
settings.rotation_reroll_note: Tip: clicking “💡 Suggestions” again deliberately shows different pen–ink pairs than the previous rounds. Once every ink of a pen has been shown, a new round starts automatically for that pen (🔁).
settings.title: Settings
settings.ui_scale_saved_body: UI scaling saved and applied. Factor: {factor}×
settings.invalid_exchange_rate: Invalid exchange rate for {currency}. Enter a number greater than 0.
settings.separators_must_differ: Decimal and thousands separators must be different.

quickstart.body:
Welcome to FountainPen Manager!

Recommended order for your first setup:

1. 🖋 Add inks – Ink management → + Ink
2. 🔧 Add nibs (optional, improves rotation)
3. ✒ Add pens – Pen management → + Pen → assign nib
4. 💧 Fill with ink – select pen → fill with ink

→ Afterwards the dashboard shows warnings, rotation makes suggestions, and the safety timer runs.
quickstart.title: 🚀  Quick start – getting started

dashboard.body: Overview of all active ink loads, safety timers for each ink, service cards, and collection values. This is where you see what needs attention.
dashboard.title: 🏠  Dashboard

expenses.body: Purchases, shipping, customs, current market value per pen/ink/nib, and the collection total. Value development and insurance values are maintained here.
expenses.title: 💰  Expenses

finished.title: Setup and first rotation completed 🎉
finished.body:
You know the everyday and expert modules, created your first data and applied a real rotation suggestion.

The guide can be restarted at any time from Help or Settings.

first_purchase.body: You know the areas now. Let’s add your first pen together. We start with a wish, move through ordered and bought, add an ink, and run the first rotation suggestion.
first_purchase.title: Now your first pen purchase

help.body: Short guides, service help for filling systems, and glossary. You can also restart this tour here.
help.title: ❓  Help

ink_add.title: Step 1 – Add your first ink
ink_add.body:
Add an ink you actually own. Brand and name are enough to begin; colour, bottle size, sheen, shimmer, and other properties can be added now or later.

If you cancel the dialog, this step remains active.

inks.body: Ink inventory with properties such as sheen, shimmer, pigment, waterproofness, remaining amount, and cleaning effort. This is the basis for rotation suggestions and safety rules.
inks.title: 🖋  Inks

nibs.body: Nibs have three layers: format = compatibility (for example Bock #6), unit = the actual nib with grind/tuner, and setup = that nib in that pen with that feed. This keeps compatibility and writing feel separate.
nibs.title: 🔧  Nibs

paper.body: Notebooks and paper with weight, surface, sheen/shading suitability, and feathering/bleedthrough rating, including compatibility with specific inks.
paper.title: 📋  Paper

pens.body: All pens with brand, model, filling system (piston/vac/converter/cartridge/eyedropper), active nib setup, and current ink. Here you fill pens, start maintenance, and manage images, notes, and tags.
pens.title: ✒  Pens

rotation.body: This is where suggestions are generated: which pen should be filled with which ink next. Each suggestion has a score and an explanation of the rules involved. You can override decisions.
rotation.title: 🔄  Rotation

rotation_run.body: With a pen and an ink, the rotation engine has material to work with. Click Generate suggestions; we switch to the rotation tab for this.
rotation_run.title: Step 4 / 4 – Run the first suggestion

rules.body: Rules control safety, rotation, maintenance, and preferences. System rules can be adjusted and disabled. Hard rules require a reason when overridden.
rules.title: ⚖  Rules

settings.body: App mode (Easy/Expert/Full Auto), language, currency, database path, and reset options if you want to start over.
settings.title: ☰  Settings

welcome.title: Welcome to FountainPen Manager
welcome.body:
We start with a module tour so you first know where each function lives. Expert areas come deliberately at the end.

Then we create one ink and one or two pens together and run a real rotation through the first fill.

wishlist.body: Wish-list pens, inks, nibs, paper, and accessories. Status flow: wish → ordered → bought. When purchased, you can transfer the item cleanly into collection and expenses.
wishlist.title: 🧾  Wishlist

wishlist_add.body: We open the wish dialog. Enter brand and model (you can add more later) and save. Click Open dialog when ready.
wishlist_add.title: Step 1 / 4 – Add a wish-list pen

wishlist_status.body:
You now see the wish in the list. Select it and use right click:
  1) Set status → Ordered
  2) once the pen arrived: Transfer as bought …

Transfer creates a real pen entry plus an expense. Click Next when done.
wishlist_status.title: Step 2 / 4 – Status: ordered → bought

ink_created.title: ✓ First ink saved
ink_created.body: Your first ink is ready and can now be used for fills, safety rules, and rotation suggestions.

pen_add.title: Step 2 – Add your first pen
pen_add.body:
Add your first pen now. The key fields are brand, model, and filling system. You can create or assign a nib now or add it later.

If you cancel the dialog, this step remains active.

pen_created.title: ✓ First pen saved
pen_created.body: Your first pen is ready. Next, the tour shows the main everyday areas. You can then fill the pen with the ink you just added.

expert_modules.title: More modules in Expert mode
expert_modules.body: Simple mode keeps the everyday workflow visible. Use the mode switch in the sidebar or Settings to access Nibs, Paper, Writing Samples, Wishlist, Expenses, Statistics, Rules, and the Enthusiast Lab.

expert_intro.title: Expert functions – final part of the module tour
expert_intro.body:
For the final part, the guide temporarily switches to Expert mode. You will see nibs, paper, writing samples, wishlist, expenses, statistics, rules and the Enthusiast Lab.

Your original mode is restored automatically when the tour ends.

writing_samples.title: 📝 Writing samples
writing_samples.body: Writing samples document real combinations of pen, nib, ink and paper. Several samples can later be compared side by side.

statistics.title: 📊 Statistics
statistics.body: Analysis of usage, collection, expenses, maintenance and value development. Filters help compare specific periods and areas.

enthusiast_lab.title: 🧪 Enthusiast Lab
enthusiast_lab.body: Optional collector tools such as ink reach, colour-family gaps, nib history and cleaning effort. They deepen collection management but are not required to get started.

setup_intro.title: Now we set up your first rotation together
setup_intro.body:
The module tour is complete. Now we work with real entries:

1. add one ink
2. add one pen
3. optionally add a second pen
4. generate and deliberately apply a suggestion

second_pen.title: Optional – add a second pen
second_pen.body:
One pen is enough for rotation. A second pen makes the selection easier to understand.

Click Choose second pen. You can then decide whether to add it or skip this optional step.

rotation_setup.title: Prepare rotation
rotation_setup.body: Rotation only considers active, empty and available pens plus inks that are not empty or archived. Your newly created entries meet these requirements.

rotation_generate.title: Generate the first rotation suggestion
rotation_generate.body: Click Generate suggestions. The engine evaluates filling system, nib, ink risk, cleaning effort, colour spectrum, role and optional rules.

rotation_result.title: Understand the suggestion
rotation_result.body: Here you see the pen, ink, score and explanation. Click the score to inspect its components. Warnings remain visible, but the decision stays yours.

rotation_apply.title: Deliberately apply the suggestion
rotation_apply.body: Apply suggestion records the suggested ink as a real fill. Only then does the safety timer start and the pen appear in the current rotation.

rotation_active.title: Your first active rotation
rotation_active.body: The fill now appears under Current assignment. From here you can manage standing time, cleaning, emptying and later refills.

triggers.help_text: App guide – module tour, expert functions, first ink, one or two pens and a complete rotation.
triggers.reset_done_body:
The app tour will be shown again on the next program start
or can be started immediately from Help/Settings.
triggers.reset_tooltip: Show the app guide again on the next start.
triggers.start_error:
The tour could not be started:
{error}
triggers.start_now_tooltip: Start the module tour, then set up the first ink, one or two pens and a rotation together.
triggers.title: Tour

wizard.ink_body:
Inks are the basis for everything:

• The safety timer tracks how long an ink is in a pen
• Rotation suggests the best pen/ink combinations
• Sheen, shimmer, and pigment define safety rules

Add at least one ink now. You can add as many as you want later.
wizard.load_body:
The last step brings everything to life:

• Select a pen in the list
• Click “Fill with ink” (toolbar or right-click on a pen)
• Select the ink from the dropdown

Once ink is loaded:
• The safety timer starts in the dashboard
• Rotation suggests empty pens for filling
• Warnings for critical combinations appear immediately

You can reset this wizard any time from Settings → Onboarding.
wizard.pen_body:
Now you can add your first pen.

Important fields:
• Filling system (piston, vac, converter, cartridge, eyedropper)
• Popularity rating (1–5), which influences suggestions
• Nib assignment, which enables nib-based rules (for example EF + wet ink)

Grail pens tagged “grail” are automatically protected from risky inks.
wizard.welcome_body:
This short introduction shows the most important first steps.

The app has an intentional order:

  🫙  Add inks first
  ✒   Then add pens and assign ink
  🔄  Only then do rotation and the safety timer come alive

If you add a pen first and then want to fill it, the ink dropdown will be empty because no ink exists yet.

This wizard guides you step by step.

second_pen.question_body:
Would you like to add a second pen for this introduction?

Two pens make it easier to see how rotation chooses between candidates, but one pen is fully sufficient.

common.import_errors_skipped: ⚠  {count} row(s) with errors will be skipped during import.
common.import_preview_summary_html: Found: {total} rows  ·  ✅ {ok} OK  ·  ⚠️ {warn} warning(s)  ·  ❌ {error} errors (will be skipped)

dashboard_widget.ink_safety_timer_tinten_mit_langer_stand: ⏱  Ink Safety Timer – inks with long dwell time
dashboard_widget.uberfallige_safety_timer_regelverstoe_er: Overduee safety timers. rule violations erscheinen in Rotation/Rules.
dashboard_widget.value_missing_currency_hint: Note: {count} price(s) without currency field use the default currency.
dashboard_widget.zeigt_fuller_im_service_manuelle_sperren: Shows pens in service, manual blocks and critical dry-out/cleaning risks.

expenses_widget.empty_subtitle: Record purchases, shipping, customs or service costs to keep track of your collection.
expenses_widget.z_b_landolt_stilo_e_stile_galaxus_bbd279: e.g. Landolt, Stilo e Stile, Galaxus
expenses_widget.z_b_pelikan_m800_service_lamy_2000_tinte: e.g. Pelikan M800, Lamy 2000 service, ink order

help_widget.diese_hilfe_erklart_die_wichtigsten_ents: This help explains the key decisions of the rule engine, the suggestion workflow and the research features – short and without jargon.
help_widget.glossary_edc_desc: “Every Day Carry” – the small group of pens you carry daily. Rotation can keep a fixed EDC count active.
help_widget.glossary_fixed_desc: “Marrying” a pen and an ink in the pen dialog. Suggestions, reroll and randomness always respect it.
help_widget.glossary_grail_desc: Especially valuable or emotionally important pen.
help_widget.glossary_hard_soft_desc: Hard rules protect the pen and can block (⛔). Soft rules are recommendations and only change the score. Both can be toggled on the Rules page.
help_widget.glossary_must_desc: A pen marked “must be in rotation” always gets a slot first in suggestions.
help_widget.glossary_override_desc: Deliberately overruling a warning or block.
help_widget.glossary_reroll_desc: Clicking “💡 Suggestions” again: deliberately shows different pen–ink pairs than previous rounds until the pool is exhausted (then 🔁 new round).
help_widget.glossary_safety_desc: Tracks how long an ink stays in a pen.
help_widget.glossary_sheen_desc: Metallic color shine on suitable paper.
help_widget.glossary_shimmer_desc: Glitter particles in the ink; higher cleaning effort.
help_widget.glossary_vac_desc: Vacuum filler. Large ink capacity but harder to clean – which is why a hard rule warns against shimmer inks in it.

legacy_exact.text_002: The rule system is an expert system. It evaluates combinations of pen, ink, nib, paper, service status and collector status. Each rule can be disabled individually or through its rule group.
legacy_exact.text_004:
Info: note without risk.
Warning: possible drawbacks, but normally usable.
Critical: high risk; check deliberately.
Blocked: do not use automatically; only manually with override.
legacy_exact.text_006: Vac pens are more involved to clean. Shimmer particles can settle in the system, so the rule can block this combination or reject it in Full Auto Mode. Manual override remains possible if you deliberately accept the risk.
legacy_exact.text_007: Full Auto may decide when you enable it. It can reject risky combinations, prefer better alternatives and skip blocked pens.
legacy_exact.text_009: Every automatic decision must be explainable: affected rule, reason, score, risk and whether an alternative was chosen. This keeps recommendations and rejections traceable.
legacy_exact.text_011: A pen in service, a problem pen or a manually locked pen is not used in rotation or Full Auto. It appears in the dashboard under Service & locks.
legacy_exact.text_013: When locking a pen you can set a start date, a duration or a planned end date directly. Without an end date, the pen remains blocked until you unlock it manually.
legacy_exact.text_015: If an ink stays in a pen longer than the safety time, the dashboard shows a warning. Critical pens should be cleaned or manually blocked as a dry-out risk.
legacy_exact.text_017: In Easy Mode, consumption stays off automatically. In Expert Mode you can enable consumption and remaining amount tracking. Filling or emptying+refilling then reduces ink stock by fill volume.
legacy_exact.text_019: Not everyone wants to maintain fill levels exactly. The app should support collection and rotation without making consumption tracking mandatory.
legacy_exact.text_020: Metallic color sheen on suitable paper.
legacy_exact.text_021: Glitter particles in the ink; higher cleaning effort.
legacy_exact.text_023: Especially valuable or emotionally important pen.
legacy_exact.text_024: Deliberately overriding a warning or block.
legacy_exact.text_025: Monitors how long an ink stays in a pen.

ink_widget.charakter_bemerkung_z_b_ideal_fur_ef_bur: Character/notes, e.g. ideal for EF, office-ready …
ink_widget.diese_tinte_wurde_bereits_verwendet_stat: Diese Ink was bereits verwendet. Statt delete als empty/archived markieren?
ink_widget.empty_subtitle: Add your first ink. Inks are the basis for safety timers and rotation suggestions.
ink_widget.es_gibt_bereits_ein_aktives_tintenfass_m:
There is already an active ink bottle with the same brand, name and bottle size.

Add another bottle anyway?
ink_widget.keine_gultigen_zeilen_in_der_csv_datei_g: No valid rows found in CSV file.
ink_widget.neues_tintenfass_wurde_angelegt_preis_un: New ink bottle added. Price and fill size were adopted.
ink_widget.tintenfass_ist_leer_nicht_mehr_vorschlag: Ink bottle empty / no longer suggest
ink_widget.z_b_sheen_monster_kuhles_grau_petrolgrun: e.g. Sheen-monster, Cool grey, Petrol green

navigation.die_navigation_wurde_im_calibre_modus_ve:
Navigation has been simplified in Calibre mode.

The main modules are fixed so the app stays stable and easy to use.
Categories, tags and filters will be managed directly in the tables.
navigation.einfachmodus_details_rechts_im_modul_c8f:
Simple mode
Details on the right in each module
navigation.expert_mode_hint: Expert mode: all collector, rule, statistics and lab features are visible.
navigation.mode_toggle_tooltip: Switches between the simple start mode and the full expert navigation.
navigation.navigation_mode_dialog_body: Navigation is intentionally simplified. Simple mode shows only the most important work areas. Use the sidebar button or this setting to show the expert area at any time.
navigation.simple_mode_hint: Simple mode: only start, pens, inks, rotation, help and settings. Expert features stay available.

nib_widget.bezug_tuner_z_b_gravitas_fnf_nibsmith_b1: Source / tuner, e.g. Gravitas, FNF, Nibsmith
nib_widget.diese_feder_ist_einem_fuller_oder_einem_: This nib is assigned to a pen or active nib setup and cannot be deleted.
nib_widget.empty_subtitle: Add your first nib — or let nibs be created automatically when saving a pen.
nib_widget.feed_beschreibung_z_b_ebonit_getunt_fur_: Feed description, e.g. 'Ebonite, tuned for more flow'
nib_widget.fuller_die_dieses_format_aufnehmen_z_b_j: Pens that accept this format, e.g. Jinhao x750, TWSBI Eco, Opus 88 …
nib_widget.neues_format_anlegen_felder_unten_ausful: — create new format / fill in fields below —
nib_widget.z_b_ef_f_m_b_stub_1_1_948c925e: e.g. EF, F, M, B, Stub 1.1

pen_widget.already_inked_warning_html:
⚠ Already inked: {ink}
Filling will mark the previous load as cleaned.
pen_widget.archive_detail_active: The pen will appear in all lists again.
pen_widget.archive_detail_archived: Archived pens are hidden. The active ink load will be closed.
pen_widget.beim_speichern_automatisch_neue_feder_an: Automatically create new nib and assign to pen when saving
pen_widget.bezug_tuner_z_b_gravitas_fnf_nibsmith_5c: Source / tuner, e.g. Gravitas, FNF, Nibsmith
pen_widget.confirm_delete_pen:
Really delete '{pen}'?
All ink loads will be lost.
pen_widget.der_fuller_wird_aus_rotation_full_auto_m: The pen is blocked from rotation, full auto mode and filling. With an end date it appears in the dashboard under Service & Blocked. Service costs are automatically added to the expense tracker.
pen_widget.diese_tinte_mit_diesem_fuller_verheirate: Fix this ink to this pen / always prefer
pen_widget.dieser_fuller_hat_keine_aktive_tinte_ac5: Dieser Pens hat no aktive Ink.
pen_widget.dieser_fuller_ist_gesperrt_in_service_un: This pen is blocked / in service and cannot be filled.
pen_widget.drop_select_first: Please select a pen in the list first — the image will be assigned to the selected pen.
pen_widget.einbau_setup_diese_feder_in_diesem_fulle: Einbau / Setup – diese Nib in diesem Pens
pen_widget.empty_subtitle: Add your first pen or transfer a purchase from the wishlist.
pen_widget.es_gibt_bereits_einen_aktiven_fuller_mit:
There is already an active pen with the same brand, model, colour and fill size.

Add as a separate copy anyway?
pen_widget.feed_einbau_notiz_flow_verandert_sitzt_e: Feed/install note: flow changed, tight fit, stiff feel …
pen_widget.fuller_muss_in_jeder_rotation_dabei_sein: Pens muss in jeder Rotation dabei sein
pen_widget.fuller_wurde_als_neues_exemplar_angelegt: Pen saved as new copy. The new purchase price was added to the expense tracker.
pen_widget.keine_gultigen_zeilen_in_der_csv_datei_g: No valid rows found in CSV file.
pen_widget.keine_tinten_vorhanden_oder_alle_leer_ar:
⚠  No inks exist or all are empty/archived.
Please create an ink in Ink Management first.

legacy_exact.text_002: Must be included in every rotation
legacy_exact.text_036: Piston filler: empty before service and rinse with lukewarm water. Do not force the piston knob. If the piston is stiff, stop turning and create a service entry.
legacy_exact.text_037: Vac filler: avoid shimmer/pigment inks for long standing times. Rinse several times and check the seal. If the stroke feels scratchy or there is a leak, lock it and plan service.
legacy_exact.text_038: Converter: remove the converter and rinse it separately. Ideal for quick cleaning and ink changes. Defective converters can be replaced cheaply.
legacy_exact.text_039: Cartridge: remove the cartridge and rinse the grip section. Do not store old cartridges open for long. If starting is difficult, soak the feed.
legacy_exact.text_040: App logic: In service or problem status, the pen is automatically blocked for filling and rotation. Service costs can be transferred to the expense tracker.

pen_widget.noch_keine_ausgaben_buchungen_mit_diesem: No expenses/transactions linked to this pen yet.
pen_widget.noch_keine_fuller_vorhanden_klicke_auf_f: No pens yet. Click '+ Pen' to add your first pen.
pen_widget.noch_keine_langen_gespeichert_trage_bei_: No lengths saved yet. Enter values under pen details → Dimensions.
pen_widget.passt_mechanisch_aber_andere_haptik_flow: Fits mechanically, but different feel/flow due to feed/body …
pen_widget.quick_select_pen_hint: Please select a pen in the list first. Tip: with exactly one active pen in your collection, the action starts automatically.
pen_widget.service_help_footer: App logic: When a pen has service or problem status, it is automatically locked for filling and rotation. Service costs can be transferred to the expense tracker.
pen_widget.similar_nib_question:
A very similar nib already exists:

{label}

Use this existing nib?

Yes = use existing item
No = create a new item with the same format
pen_widget.size_chart_hint: Length in mm: closed (dark), uncapped (medium), posted (light)
pen_widget.vergleicht_gespeicherte_fullermae_nutzt_: Compares saved pen dimensions. Uses closed/open/posted length where available.
pen_widget.wahle_einen_fuller_aus_der_liste_b81e86b: Choose a pen from the list.
pen_widget.z_b_ef_f_m_stub_semiflex_f_97d0d2cd: e.g. EF, F, M, Stub, Semiflex F
pen_widget.z_b_feder_kratzt_kolbenservice_beim_nibm: e.g. nib scratches, piston service, at nibmeister, dries out, hard starts …
pen_widget.z_b_gravitas_ef_im_jinhao_x750_3cbcdf3a: e.g. Gravitas EF in Jinhao x750
pen_widget.z_b_jinhao_feed_gravitas_feed_ebonit_fee: e.g. Jinhao feed, Gravitas feed, Ebonite feed
pen_widget.z_b_standard_italic_ef_light_italic_1eeb: e.g. default, italic, EF light italic

rotation_widget.aktives_papier_beeinflusst_den_score_ef_: Active paper affects the score: EF + high feathering → penalty. Sheen + smooth → bonus.
rotation_widget.aktuelle_tinte_austragen_fuller_als_leer: Current ink austragen / Pens als empty markieren
rotation_widget.aktuelle_tinte_austragen_und_ausgewahlte: Remove current ink and load selected new ink
rotation_widget.bitte_zuerst_eine_neue_tinte_auswahlen_8: Please zuerst eine new Ink select.
rotation_widget.du_kannst_die_kombination_trotzdem_ubern: You can still apply this combination. Please provide a brief reason – it will be stored in the override log.
rotation_widget.freie_tinten_verfugbar_nicht_leer_nicht_: 🧴 Available inks – not empty, not currently loaded
rotation_widget.i_score_legende_leer_120_nicht_genutzt_t: ℹ️ Score legend: Empty: +120 · Not used (days): +0…+70 · Colour spectrum new: +14 · Colour family duplicate: −18 · Ink already active: −22 · Shimmer: −25 · Pigment: −20 · Sheen strong: −10 · Vac+difficult ink: −35 · RuleEngine includes popularity/required/fixed pair
rotation_widget.keine_freien_tinten_alle_verfugbaren_tin: No free inks. All available inks are currently in use or empty/archived.

legacy_exact.text_005: No active pens found. Please add a pen first (Pen management → + Pen).
legacy_exact.text_006: No inks available. Please add inks first (Ink management → + Ink).
legacy_exact.text_007: No direct fill suggestions. Check below which filled pens can be emptied.
legacy_exact.text_010: Pen empty for a long time
legacy_exact.text_011: Ink not used for a long time

rotation_widget.no_nib_hint: ⚠ {count} pen(s) without nib → nib rules inactive.
rotation_widget.score_interne_gewichtung_der_rotation_ho:
Score = internal rotation weighting.
Higher = better recommendation.

Empty: +100
Not used (days): up to +50
Colour spectrum new: +14
Colour family duplicate: −18
Shimmer risk: −25
Pigment risk: −20
Sheen strong: −10
Vac + difficult ink: −35
Popularity: ±10
rotation_widget.suggestion_summary: {count} suggestion(s).{nib_hint} Confirm with ✓ Apply, or use double-click/right-click.

rules_widget.confirm_disable_system_rule: '{rule}' is a built-in system rule. It will not be deleted, but disabled so it does not come back as a stale-file/reset problem on restart. Disable it?
rules_widget.doppelklick_auf_eine_regel_schaltet_sie_: Double-click a rule to toggle active/inactive. Right-click opens edit/delete. 'Active' means the individual rule; 'Effective' also considers whether the group is enabled.
rules_widget.einfachmodus_vorlage_wahlen_name_warnstu: Simple mode: choose template, check name/warning level, save. The parameter field remains editable for special rules.
rules_widget.expert_mode_aktivieren_verbrauch_einscha: Enable expert mode + activate consumption tracking
rules_widget.expert_mode_automatische_restmengen_verb: Expert mode: toggle automatic remaining/consumption tracking.
rules_widget.expert_mode_verbrauch_kann_aktiviert_wer: Expert mode – consumption tracking can be enabled
rules_widget.full_auto_darf_riskante_kombinationen_ab: Full auto may reject risky combinations
rules_widget.full_auto_darf_selbst_override_verwenden: Full auto may use override itself
rules_widget.full_auto_erklart_jede_entscheidung_rege: Full auto explains every decision: rule, reason, score, risk and whether rejected or applied. Every individual rule remains separately toggleable.
rules_widget.full_auto_mode_aktiv_engine_darf_entsche: Full auto mode active – engine may decide
rules_widget.im_easy_mode_ist_automatische_verbrauchs: In easy mode, automatic consumption/remaining tracking is disabled.
rules_widget.leer_automatisch_nach_warnstufe_z_b_30_o: empty = automatic by warning level, e.g. -30 or +15
rules_widget.parameter_werden_uber_vorlagen_gefullt_f: Parameters are filled via templates. Advanced users can edit JSON.
rules_widget.regelgruppen_gespeichert_anderungen_wirk: Rule groups saved. Changes take effect immediately on rotation, full auto and consumption.
rules_widget.regeln_sind_jetzt_in_reitern_getrennt_ve: Rules are now separated into tabs. Consumption/remaining is intentionally off in easy mode; switch to expert mode or use the quick button in the 'Rule groups' tab.
rules_widget.regelsystem_und_full_auto_mode_gespeiche: Rule system and full auto mode saved.
rules_widget.schaltet_diese_regelgruppe_komplett_ein_: Toggles this rule group on/off completely. Disabling consumption = remaining quantity is not automatically reduced when filling.
rules_widget.score_delta_muss_eine_ganze_zahl_sein_od: Score delta must be a whole number or left empty.
rules_widget.systemregel_name_bleibt_stabil_damit_der: System rule: name stays stable so the seed doesn't create duplicates on restart. Content/warning level/group remain editable.
rules_widget.verbrauch_restmenge_aus_weil_easy_mode_a: Consumption / remaining: OFF because easy mode is active. Switch to expert mode to enable.
rules_widget.verbrauch_restmenge_im_expert_mode_frei_: Consumption / remaining: freely toggleable in expert mode. Tick the box and click 'Save rule groups'.

settings_widget.achtung_diese_aktion_loscht_alle_fuller_:
WARNING: This action permanently deletes all pens, inks, nibs, paper,
InkLoads and expenses!

System rules and settings are retained.

Please create a backup first. Really continue?
settings_widget.aktuelle_daten_in_neue_datenbank_kopiere: Copy current data into the new database
settings_widget.alle_aktiven_inkloads_werden_auf_gereini:
All active InkLoads will be set to 'cleaned'.
The histories will be kept.

Continue?
settings_widget.alle_daten_werden_lokal_gespeichert_kein: All data is stored locally – no cloud, no tracking.
settings_widget.alle_fuller_werden_auf_status_verfugbar_:
All pens will be set to 'available' status.
Service data, blocks and blocked_until will be deleted.

Continue?
settings_widget.alle_nutzerdaten_werden_jetzt_geloscht_d:
ALL USER DATA WILL BE DELETED NOW.
This cannot be undone!

Really delete?
settings_widget.alle_nutzerdaten_wurden_geloscht_db37992: All user data has been deleted.
settings_widget.appearance_page_body: Adjust font and UI size globally. Applies immediately to new and already open windows.
settings_widget.auf_laptop_hidpi_meistens_auto_oder_lapt: On laptop/HiDPI screens, “Auto” or “Large laptop” usually works best. This setting prevents clipped text in dialogs.
settings_widget.currency_region_page_body: Number format, default currency and exchange rates for collection value and expenses.
settings_widget.das_ist_bereits_der_aktuelle_pfad_a48c99: This is already the current path.
settings_widget.datensatze_bleiben_erhalten_nur_bestimmt: Records are retained. Only certain status or consumption fields are reset.
settings_widget.db_path_copy_action: Current data will be copied to the new file, then work will continue there.
settings_widget.db_path_switch_action:
The specified file will be used.
Existing data in the old file will remain unchanged.
settings_widget.einstellungen_wurden_gespeichert_sprache:
Settings wasn saved.
Language was sofort angewendet.
settings_widget.exportiert_fuller_tinten_federn_papier_i: Exports pens, inks, nibs, paper, InkLoads and expenses into separate CSV files.
settings_widget.general_page_body: Basic application settings. Rule details and consumption logic remain in the app’s dedicated Rules tab.
settings_widget.i_beim_offnen_einer_vorhandenen_db_wird_: ℹ  When opening an existing database, nothing is copied – the file is used unchanged.
settings_widget.kurse_werden_fur_die_umrechnung_des_samm: Rates are used to convert the collection value. CHF is always = 1.0.

legacy_exact.text_017: Database path, manual backups and maintenance. All data stays local.
legacy_exact.text_023: Tip: Before larger migrations or a factory reset, always save a backup first.
legacy_exact.text_025: Data exchange and backup as CSV. Export is now separate from backup and database path.
legacy_exact.text_027: Imports are located in their respective modules so preview and validation match the data type.
legacy_exact.text_028: Intentionally separated so critical actions are not placed between normal settings.
legacy_exact.text_031: Set all active fills to 'cleaned'. Histories are kept.
legacy_exact.text_033: Reset remaining_ml of all inks to bottle size; is_empty = False.
legacy_exact.text_035: Reset service locks and blocked_until; set all pens to 'available'.
legacy_exact.text_037: Factory reset permanently deletes all user data. System rules and settings remain. Create a backup first.
legacy_exact.text_040: Local desktop app for collection, rotation, maintenance, rules and value preservation.
legacy_exact.text_042: Settings are now modular. New options should be added as separate pages or rule groups, not as an endless list.

settings_widget.neue_datenbank_leer_starten_nur_pfad_wec: Start with an empty database / only change path
settings_widget.neue_leere_datenbank_anlegen_frisch_star: Create a new empty database (fresh start)
settings_widget.optionen_sind_nach_bereichen_getrennt_li: Options are grouped by area. Choose an area on the left and change settings on the right. Each page has its own scrollbar when needed.
settings_widget.region_saved_message:
Region {region} · currency {currency} · rates saved.
All views will be reloaded.
settings_widget.remaining_ml_aller_tinten_wird_auf_die_e:
remaining_ml of all inks will be reset to the stored bottle size.
is_empty and is_archived will be set to False.

Continue?
settings_widget.reset_ink_levels_tooltip: Reset remaining_ml of all inks to bottle size; is_empty = False.
settings_widget.reset_inkloads_tooltip: Set all active fills to 'cleaned'. Histories are kept.
settings_widget.reset_pen_status_tooltip: Reset service locks and blocked_until; set all pens to 'available'.
settings_widget.rules_density_note: The Rules page also has its own table density. This global setting still applies to fonts, input fields, tabs, buttons and dialogs across the whole app.
settings_widget.rules_module_note: Easy/Expert Mode, Full Auto Mode, individual rule groups and automatic consumption are managed in the Rules module. This keeps settings lean.
settings_widget.vorhandene_datenbankdatei_offnen_wechsel: Open / switch to an existing database file
settings_widget.was_mochtest_du_tun_3c2ef2c3: What do you want to do?
settings_widget.backup_failed_message:
The full backup could not be created:
{error}
settings_widget.restore_backup_confirm_body: The current database, media, and settings will be replaced by the backup. A fallback backup is created automatically first. Continue?
settings_widget.restore_backup_rollback_success: The previous state was restored automatically from the fallback backup.
settings_widget.restore_backup_rollback_failed: The automatic rollback to the previous state also failed: {error}
settings_widget.restore_backup_rollback_not_available: No fallback backup had been created yet; the existing data was not intentionally replaced.

statistics_widget.budget_unset: No budget set — limits can be defined in Settings.
statistics_widget.export_failed_body: The file could not be written: {error}
statistics_widget.period_hint: Expense period: {expense_period}. Usage period: {usage_period}. Usage is based on InkLoad history: fills, overlapping usage days and recorded volume.
statistics_widget.period_hint_separate: Expense period: {expense_period}. Pen period: {pen_period}. Ink period: {ink_period}. Usage is based on InkLoad history: fills, overlapping usage days and recorded volume.
statistics_widget.title: Statistics

wishlist_widget.alles_kann_als_wunsch_erfasst_werden_ful: Anything can be tracked as a wish: pen, ink, nib, paper, accessories or service. Images/invoices are stored in a separate item-card file, not in SQLite.
wishlist_widget.ein_wishlist_kauf_wird_nie_still_ubernom: A wishlist purchase is never silently applied: object, expense and item card are traceably linked.
wishlist_widget.empty_subtitle: Add pens, inks or accessories you want to keep an eye on.
wishlist_widget.transfer_intro: '{title}' was purchased. What should be converted?

update.apply_start_failed: The update process could not be started: {error}
update.confirm_apply_text: The app will close, apply the update and restart afterwards.
update.hint_github_placeholder: GitHub release path active: https://github.com/sloogy/FPM/releases. Manifest: https://github.com/sloogy/FPM/releases/latest/download/latest.json.
update.settings_explain: The update manager follows the BudgetManager model: check manifest, validate SHA256, stage the asset and apply it only after confirmation. Installer installations prefer the setup asset, portable builds use the portable ZIP.
update.settings_manifest_note: GitHub release path active: https://github.com/sloogy/FPM/releases. Manifest: https://github.com/sloogy/FPM/releases/latest/download/latest.json.
update.title: Check for updates

wishlist.already_transferred_body: This wishlist item has already been transferred as {type} #{id}. No duplicate was created.
wishlist.transfer_done_body: The purchase was transferred and linked to {type} #{id}.
wishlist.transfer_expense_body: The expense was recorded. No collection object was created.
wishlist.transfer_none_body: The status was set to bought. No collection object was created.
wishlist.use_transfer_body: Please use “Transfer as bought …” so a real entry and an expense are created. The status was not silently set to bought.

writing_samples.compare_hint: Select two to four writing samples. This view compares the combination, dry time, paper behaviour and rating side by side.
writing_samples.compare_select_hint: Please select two to four writing samples first.
writing_samples.compare_warning_line: Tip: for a cleaner comparison, choose two to four samples with similar paper or the same ink.
writing_samples.compare_winner_line: Recommendation: {title} is the strongest combination in this comparison.
writing_samples.empty_subtitle: Add your first sample to make combinations comparable over time.
writing_samples.hint: Scrivener-style binder: document real pen, ink, nib and paper combinations with photo, text sample, dry time and writing feel.
writing_samples.image_placeholder: Local image or direct image URL – stored with the pen on save
writing_samples.sample_text_placeholder: For example pangram, quote, everyday sentence, signature, quick note or long writing test …
writing_samples.search_placeholder: Search sample, pen, ink or paper …
writing_samples.tags_placeholder: e.g. sheen, daily, train, tomoe, problem, favorite
writing_samples.title: Writing samples

ui.pen_widget.size_compare_visual_hint: Compares saved pen dimensions as stylized, scaled fountain pens. In overlay mode all pens start at the same left edge so length differences are immediately visible.
ui.pen_widget.size_chart_hint: Stylized pens by length; closed/uncapped/posted depending on selection.
